data.content: Plan is directionally correct and feasible, but the validation strategy does not yet cover the behavior being changed.  exercises build and artifact upload only; it does not execute the  step that will change from  to . Revise the plan to include a concrete verification path for the release-triggered asset upload behavior, either by exercising the release/tag path directly or by restructuring the workflow so the upload logic can be validated under a non-release trigger. Also make the hosted-runner dependency explicit: the CLI replacement is feasible because current GitHub-hosted x64/macOS runners and the current  partner image include GitHub CLI.
